data.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://aofund.org/#wp--skip-link--target)

Small business owners need more than just financing. You need the practical tools, knowledge, and a network that has your back. That’s where Accion Opportunity Fund steps in. We’re not just lenders; we’re partners in your business who believe in your vision.

We provide real human support, expert guidance, and user-friendly technology to help you not only succeed, but truly thrive. Our approach blends innovative digital tools with one-on-one advising, giving personalized support that meets you where you are.

![](https://aofund.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/image23-e1745870596880-1024x947.jpg)

### Committed to making an impact for small business

As the nation’s leading nonprofit small business lender, AOF brings 30 years of experience serving and advocating for small businesses across the country. We work at the local and national level to advocate for policies, resources, and opportunities for small business owners who have historically lacked access to affordable and responsible financing and the tools and resources to grow.

30+ years of service

4.5M+clients served across lending and learning

$1B+invested in small businesses

90%of our clients come from underserved communities

## Smart financing created for small business owners

Small businesses deserve a chance to prosper. That’s why our loans are built for you—transparent, flexible, and free from hidden fees or predatory terms.

[Learn more about our loans](https://aofund.org/business-loans/)

![](https://aofund.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Uli1-edited.jpg)Uli Nasibova, Uli’s Gelato

![](https://aofund.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Carlos-Perez-AOF-Client-600x650.jpg)

> The impact AOF will have on our business is very positive because we’re able to invest in inventory for the business.”
>
> **Carlos Perez**
>
> Meat Town Distributors

Small Business Term Loans

Small Business Term LoansTruck FinancingFood Truck Financing

## Small Business Term Loans

Get the financing you need to expand, invest, and take your business to new heights.

[Learn More](https://aofund.org/business-loans/small-business-term-loan/)

![](https://aofund.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/iStock-1153419503-600x450.jpg)

## Skill up your business

With AOF, you don’t just get access to affordable financing. You’ll have expert support at every stage of your journey, along with tools and resources designed to empower your business.

[View resources](https://aofund.org/resources/)

### Business Advising

Get free guidance tailored to your unique challenges and goals. Our expert advisors help you tackle everything from financial planning to marketing strategies.

[How It Works](https://aofund.org/resources/business-advising/)

### Personalized Learning

Access resources and insights designed specifically for your business stage, your industry, and the challenges you face.

[Learn More](https://aofund.org/resources/personalized-learning/)

### Programs & Grants

Level up with workshops, training, and in-depth courses on essential topics like financial management, growth strategies, and digital marketing.

[Explore](https://aofund.org/resources/programs/)

## Business resources

### Discover everything you need to elevate your business.

With AOF, you don’t just get access to affordable financing. You’ll have expert support at every stage of your journey, along with tools and resources designed to empower small business owners.

[Browse the resource library](https://aofund.org/resources/resource-center/)
